title: felicia pappei
intro: Felicia pappei, also known as the Blue Felicia or Blue Daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. It is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. The leaves and flowers of the Felicia pappei plant can be prepared as teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
